title: POST /books endpoint
evidence: src/app.ts:25-41 — endpoint accepts title, author, year, isbn and returns 201

title: GET /books endpoint with ?author= filter
evidence: src/app.ts:44-53 — endpoint supports author query parameter with LIKE filtering

title: GET /books/{id} endpoint
evidence: src/app.ts:56-62 — endpoint returns single book by ID with 404 handling

title: PUT /books/{id} endpoint
evidence: src/app.ts:65-91 — endpoint updates book fields with partial update support

title: DELETE /books/{id} endpoint
evidence: src/app.ts:94-101 — endpoint deletes book and returns 204

title: SQLite database
evidence: src/db.ts uses better-sqlite3, creates books table with proper schema

title: JSON responses with appropriate HTTP status codes
evidence: src/app.ts — 201 for create, 200 for get, 204 for delete, 400 for validation, 404 for not found

title: Input validation (title and author required)
evidence: src/app.ts:28-33 — validates title and author, rejects empty strings

title: README.md with setup and run instructions
At least 3 unit/integration tests
evidence: src/__tests__/books.test.ts — 15 tests total covering all endpoints
